tailored.summary: I am a backend engineer with 5 years of experience building Python services and REST APIs. I have a proven track record of developing robust backend services using C#, .NET Core, and SQL Server, and I am proficient in Docker for containerization. My experience includes creating RESTful APIs and I am eager to contribute my skills to building full-stack solutions.

bullets: Developed RESTful APIs using Python and FastAPI to support internal tooling.
Wrote and optimized SQL queries against a PostgreSQL database for data retrieval.
Containerized services using Docker and managed deployments on AWS.
